extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož reclaimed race lead by pacing perfectly through 30km headwind, then crushing final climb to beat BARTA by 1 second.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ paced conservatively through 30km headwind block before final climb, avoided CARAPAZ mistake of going too hard early.
Bike change execution at climb base critical: BARTA's cyclocross skills gained seconds but ROGLIČ superior climbing negated advantage.
CARAPAZ tactical error matching ROGLIČ power on flat 30km headwind section caused disintegration on final climb costing 49 seconds.
CARTHY gained podium position by riding within himself on flat, preserving climbing legs unlike CARAPAZ who burned matches early.

rider_signals.BARTA Will: positive: Unknown American nearly won by 1 second with exceptional TT and climbing, but team folding suggests talent underutilized.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Psychological resilience after Tour collapse shown by regaining lead on similar hill-finish TT, pacing discipline superior to rivals.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Lost 49 seconds and lead by tactical error of matching ROGLIČ on flat headwind section before climb.
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: Conservative flat pacing strategy moved him onto podium while CARAPAZ imploded from overpacing.
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Nelson: positive: Set early benchmark 48 seconds faster than CAVAGNA showing Portuguese TT depth beyond known specialists.
